title: AL's Armor Stands Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Armor Stands and adds more variants!
body:
![Armor Stands Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17dec1bd34b572448afd54e4f2b7e46a8c2c0460.png)

A pack that revamps Armor Stands and adds more variants by adding many decorative renamable variants!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VYAeA9MdxDY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

In order to obtain the variants, you need to rename an Armor Stand in an Anvil using one of the valid names listed below.



**List of valid Armor Stand renames:**

*Birch Armor Stand

*Spruce Armor Stand

*Jungle Armor Stand

*Acacia Armor Stand

*Dark Oak Armor Stand

*Mangrove Armor Stand

*Cherry Armor Stand

*Pale Armor Stand

*Crimson Armor Stand

*Warped Armor Stand

*Bamboo Armor Stand

*Target Dummy

*Stone Armor Stand

*Gargoyle

*Anatomy of a Creeper

*Wildfire

*Stone Pawn

*Stone Rook

*Stone Knight

*Stone Bishop

*Stone Queen

*Stone King

*Deepslate Pawn

*Deepslate Rook

*Deepslate Knight

*Deepslate Bishop

*Deepslate Queen

*Deepslate King

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
